_about: Per-operation perf budgets in nanoseconds for the Python implementation. measured = scripts/run_performance_smoke.py --iterations 300000 --runs 5 --emit-json. baseline_ns is the median measurement on the listed runner; tolerance_multiplier sets the budget = baseline_ns * tolerance_multiplier. Update via `make perf-baseline-python` (Linux+macOS locally; Windows generated on CI workflow_dispatch).
